# Law on the Protection of Personal Data (KVKK)

Jurisdiction: Türkiye
Region: TR
Citation: Law No. 6698 on the Protection of Personal Data
Authority: KVKK Authority
Source URL: https://www.kvkk.gov.tr/Icerik/6649/Personal-Data-Protection-Law
Topics: lawful_basis, notice_transparency, consent, sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, third_party_sharing, cross_border_transfer, retention_deletion, security_breach, data_minimization, accountability
Keywords: KVKK, Turkey, explicit consent, special categories of personal data, data controller registry, Türkiye, 土耳其

## Summary
Türkiye's personal data protection law with explicit consent and statutory exceptions, data subject rights, special-category data controls, transfer restrictions, deletion/destruction/anonymisation, and controller registry duties.

## Key compliance obligations
- Process personal data with explicit consent or another legal basis.
- Give notices and respond to data subject applications.
- Delete, destroy, or anonymise personal data when processing grounds cease.
- Apply transfer conditions for domestic and cross-border disclosures.
